Skip to contents
survtrans 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Cross-validation for survtran

Source: R/cv_survtrans.R
cv_survtrans.Rd

Cross-validation for survtran

Usage

cv_survtrans(
  data,
  fit_source,
  penalty = "lasso",
  gamma = NULL,
  nfolds = 10,
  nlambdas = 100,
  lambda_min_ratio = NULL,
  seed = 0,
  control,
  ...
)

Arguments

data

a data frame containing the variables in the model.

fit_source

a survode object.

penalty

a character string specifying the type of penalty. Possible values are "lasso", "MCP" and "SCAD".

gamma

a numeric value specifying the tuning parameter for MCP or SCAD.

nfolds

an integer specifying the number of folds.

nlambdas

an integer specifying the number of lambda values.

lambda_min_ratio

a numeric value specifying the minimum lambda value as a fraction of lambda_max.

seed

an integer specifying the random seed.

control

Object of class survtrans_control containing control parameters for the fitting algorithm. Default is survtrans_control(...).

...

Other arguments passed to survtrans_control.

Value

a cv_survtran object.

Examples

library(survode)
library(survtrans)
fit_src <- survode(Surv(time, status) ~ ., data = sim1_src, df = 10)
cv_survtrans(sim1_trg, fit_src)
#> $coefficients
#> $coefficients$gamma
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $coefficients$beta
#>         X1         X2         X3         X4         X5         X6         X7 
#> -0.5967129  1.4157648 -1.0187559  1.0047907 -0.8351245  1.0413994 -1.1442181 
#>         X8         X9        X10 
#>  0.9215155 -0.9925437  1.1115023 
#> 
#> $coefficients$eta
#>  [1]  0.406914407  0.358763480 -0.023421532  0.000000000  0.188902618
#>  [6]  0.000000000 -0.112200218  0.000000000  0.006101134  0.108903514
#> 
#> $coefficients$penalty
#> [1] "lasso"
#> 
#> $coefficients$lambda
#> [1] 0.04378866
#> 
#> $coefficients$formula
#> Surv(time, status) ~ .
#> <environment: 0x563fe9e1e128>
#> 
#> 
#> $lambdas
#>   [1] 3.089203e-01 2.814767e-01 2.564711e-01 2.336869e-01 2.129268e-01
#>   [6] 1.940110e-01 1.767756e-01 1.610713e-01 1.467622e-01 1.337242e-01
#>  [11] 1.218445e-01 1.110202e-01 1.011575e-01 9.217093e-02 8.398272e-02
#>  [16] 7.652192e-02 6.972393e-02 6.352984e-02 5.788603e-02 5.274359e-02

#>  [26] 3.018182e-02 2.750055e-02 2.505748e-02 2.283144e-02 2.080316e-02
#>  [31] 1.895506e-02 1.727115e-02 1.573683e-02 1.433881e-02 1.306499e-02
#>  [36] 1.190433e-02 1.084678e-02 9.883186e-03 9.005191e-03 8.205195e-03
#>  [41] 7.476268e-03 6.812097e-03 6.206929e-03 5.655523e-03 5.153102e-03
#>  [46] 4.695314e-03 4.278195e-03 3.898132e-03 3.551833e-03 3.236298e-03
